role: VP and head of National Youth Organization (2009-2010); Minister of Roads and Urban Development under Raisi (2022-2024); former CEO of SAIPA
bio:
Mehrdad Bazrpash is an Iranian principlist politician who served as Vice President and head of the National Youth Organization under [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) from 2009 to 2010, and later as Minister of Roads and Urban Development in [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi)'s cabinet from 2022 to 2024.

Bazrpash was formerly CEO of SAIPA and Pars Khodro, two of Iran's largest automakers. He served as a member of parliament and was appointed President of the Supreme Audit Court from 2020 to 2022.

As [Minister of Roads](/orgs/ministry-of-roads), Bazrpash was aboard one of the three helicopters in Raisi's convoy during the May 2024 trip to inaugurate a dam on the Azerbaijan border. President Raisi's helicopter crashed in that incident, killing all aboard, though Bazrpash was in a separate aircraft that landed safely.

sources.title: Mehrdad Bazrpash Named Iran's Minister Of Roads — Iran Front Page

editorial_notes: Born ~1980. Former CEO of SAIPA and Pars Khodro. Supreme Audit Court president 2020-2022. Was in Raisi's helicopter convoy May 2024 but survived.
